No recent confirmations, announcements, or resolutions impacting markets | NO | LOW confidence**

No breaking news, resolved events, or announcements (e.g., on GTA VI at 1% for pre-June 2026 release or MegaETH airdrop at 60%) are tied to immediate market moves or X buzz in results.[4] Data is static from April 9-19, lacking real-time X posts as of April 22, 2026, 9 AM UTC.
